question: Will any of the host nations lose their opening match in the FIFA world cup 2026
textDescription:
Resolves yes if Mexico loses to South Africa, Canada loses to Bosnia Herzegovina or USA loses to Paraguay in their opening game of the tournament. 

Resolves no otherwise.
